projectdescription: Explore my latest work and side projects.
noprojects: No projects found matching your search.
description1: Real-time multiplayer digital card game that invites players to explore emotions, ideas, and experiences through play. Perfect for families, educators, and professionals looking to spark meaningful dialogue.
description2: Official Almacenajes SA e-commerce platform with multi-gateway payment integration. Connected in real-time to the SiteLink system for storage unit management, delivering a seamless and secure shopping experience.
description3: Official Almacenajes SA website — Panama's leading mini-storage chain. Built with Astro for maximum performance, advanced SEO, and Google Analytics integration for optimized lead generation.
description4: Fiscal printing system for RVSolutions+ clients in the Republic of Panama. Integrated with QuickBooks and Zoho to automate electronic invoicing, reduce manual errors, and ensure full tax compliance.
description5: Business solution for reading electrical consumption at pedestals and automated billing for Shelter Bay Marina. Optimizes energy management and eliminates manual billing errors.
description6: Web system for comprehensive file, client, and case management for a law firm. Enables real-time tracking of legal processes with secure role-based access control.
description7: Official Haus Panama website — real estate portal specializing in apartment and house sales across Panama. Built with Astro for maximum speed, advanced SEO, and a premium user experience.
description8: Enterprise web app integrated with Zoho One to manage Semah's accounts payable requests. Connected to Zoho Books with email integration for a fully digital and traceable approval workflow.
description9: Official website for Proyecto Astre — a luxury real estate development in Panama City. Premium design with Astro and React for a stunning visual experience, optimized for buyer acquisition.
description10: Business booking system for Semah's conference rooms. Real-time availability management with secure authentication and automatic notifications for a frictionless experience.
description11: Digital platform for managing service requests at Almacenajes SA. Optimized workflow with real-time validation, automatic notifications, and Firebase storage.
description12: Production-ready online store template with product catalog, shopping cart, and user authentication. Built with React and Firebase, adaptable to any digital business.
description13: Corporate website for Mauad&Mauad Law Firm. Professional and elegant design with Shadcn UI, showcasing the firm's legal services, team, and track record.
description14: Business solution under development for managing and booking transportation routes at Shelter Bay Marina. Automates ticket sales and real-time transfer tracking.
